Season.description: The MLB season for which these totals apply

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar)

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

Key.description: Abbreviation of the team (e.g. LAD; PHI; BOS; CHC; etc.)

City.description: The city/location of the team (e.g. Los Angeles; Philadelphia; Boston; Chicago; etc.)

League.description: The league of the team (possible values: AL; NL)

Division.description: The division of the team (e.g. East, Central, West)

Wins.description: The total number of wins by a team in the season

Losses.description: Total number of losses by the team in the season

DivisionWins.description: Total number of division wins in the season

DivisionLosses.description: Total number of division losses in a season

GamesBehind.description: Number of games behind the first place team

LastTenGamesWins.description: Total number of wins in the last ten games

LastTenGamesLosses.description: Total number of losses in the last ten games

Streak.description: Current streak the team is on (e.g. Win 3, Lost 3)

WildCardRank.description: The rank of the team in terms of Wild Card standings only

WildCardGamesBehind.description: The number of games behind a team is of the final Wild Card spot

HomeWins.description: Total number of home wins in the season

HomeLosses.description: Total number of home losses in the season

AwayWins.description: Total number of away wins in the season

AwayLosses.description: Total number of away losses in the season

DayWins.description: Total number of wins in daytime games

DayLosses.description: Total number of losses in daytime games

NightWins.description: Total number of wins in nighttime games

NightLosses.description: Total number of losses in nighttime games

RunsScored.description: Total runs scored by the team in the season

RunsAgainst.description: Total number of runs scored by the opponents of a specified team

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

ClinchedBestLeagueRecord.description: Returns TRUE if team has clinched the best record in their respective league; FALSE if not

ClinchedWildCard.description: Returns TRUE if team has clinched Wild Card spot; FALSE if not

ClinchedDivision.description: Returns TRUE if team has clinched their division; FALSE if not

EliminatedFromPlayoffContention.description: Returns TRUE if team has been eliminated from playoff contention; FALSE if not
